libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native test execution of io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 on JDK 25, configure runtime system properties: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Meaningful tests can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1 for GET/POST JSON, forms, multipart upload, redirects, cookies/sessions, caching, and BodyCodec coverage; no Docker service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient depends on the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 module; only add that dependency if tests intentionally cover OAuth2-specific APIs.
Local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative because the reported failure is in native runtime behavior rather than dependency resolution.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 is usable with the normal local Vert.x HTTP server scaffold and no external service, but it still pulls Netty 4.2.x; Java 25 native runs need the same explicit Netty/Unsafe system properties already used for 5.0.0.
